wiki.summary: “If It Only Gets Better” is the second single and fifth track off Joji’s fourth studio album, Piss In The Wind. It serves as the fifth track of the album. This single follows the release of “PIXELATED KISSES” on October 14, 2025. Joji first revealed the song on November 3, 2025, through an Instagram story where he stated the following: The story included a pre-save link for the song, which would also include a link to the song's music video on YouTube. Read more on Last.fm.
